notes.message: Service 'audiobookshelf': runtime user could not be determined; set securityContext explicitly.
Service 'audiobookshelf': no health check was detected. Add a readiness/liveness probe manually.

Service 'audiobookshelf' declared Compose restart policy 'unless-stopped' — this has no direct Deployment equivalent and is not rendered as any field. Deployments always maintain the desired replica count regardless of this setting.
Bind mount './audiobooks' -> '/audiobooks' converted to PVC scaffolding 'audiobookshelf-audiobooks' — the data currently lives on the host and must be migrated into the PVC.
Bind mount './podcasts' -> '/podcasts' converted to PVC scaffolding 'audiobookshelf-podcasts' — the data currently lives on the host and must be migrated into the PVC.
Bind mount './config' -> '/config' converted to PVC scaffolding 'audiobookshelf-config' — the data currently lives on the host and must be migrated into the PVC.
Bind mount './metadata' -> '/metadata' converted to PVC scaffolding 'audiobookshelf-metadata' — the data currently lives on the host and must be migrated into the PVC.

findings.message: Service 'audiobookshelf' bind-mounts host path './audiobooks' to '/audiobooks' — host paths don't translate to Kubernetes.
findings.remediation: Replace with a named volume/PVC, or an init step that populates the data in-cluster.

findings.message: Service 'audiobookshelf' bind-mounts host path './podcasts' to '/podcasts' — host paths don't translate to Kubernetes.
findings.remediation: Replace with a named volume/PVC, or an init step that populates the data in-cluster.

findings.remediation: Replace with a named volume/PVC, or an init step that populates the data in-cluster.

findings.message: Service 'audiobookshelf' bind-mounts host path './metadata' to '/metadata' — host paths don't translate to Kubernetes.
findings.remediation: Replace with a named volume/PVC, or an init step that populates the data in-cluster.
Add a healthcheck so readiness/liveness probes can be generated automatically.

findings.message: Service 'audiobookshelf' declares no user — it will run as the image's default user (often root).
Compose field 'services.audiobookshelf.container_name' was read but is not yet modeled by gitops-scaffold.
findings.remediation: Review this field manually — it will not influence generated manifests.
